text.title: OpenAI Fine-Tuning Evaluation — Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing `fine-tuning-openai-eval` applied to a real-shape scenario.

section.title: Worked example: tone-classifier eval
section.p: ft:gpt-4o-mini::tone_v1 vs gpt-4o-mini base. 300 held-out tickets, hash-disjoint from train/val.

list.item: accuracy ft=88%, base=68%, delta=20pp, CI ±4% → passed=true.
format_compliance ft=99%, base=84%, delta=15pp, CI ±2% → passed=true.
gate_decision=pass. Hand off to deployment methodology.
